_comment: Declarative workflow definition for document-intelligence. Runs the parser-independent docintel pipeline (ingest → recover/OCR → structure → govern → knowledge → artifact) and emits governed knowledge assets with provenance.
description: Document pipeline: ingest → recover/OCR → structure → govern → reading-level check → quality gate

steps.note: Parse raw file into UDOM — select parser by capability (stdlib .txt/.html default; PyMuPDF for PDF; Docling/Surya as plugins)
Estimate reading level of extracted body text for consumer artifact metadata

note: document-intelligence reads/structures documents you already have. It does NOT fetch from the web or Google Drive — discovery/crawling is standards-updater. Never fabricate: unrecovered regions → low confidence + capability-gap note.
